checks.name: Suite and member roots
checks.summary: Resolved suite root and bounded suite member root.

checks.name: Suite map and contract records
checks.summary: Loaded suite map and suite contract JSON records when available and checked their declared schema subsets.

checks.name: Suite member inventory
checks.summary: Validated member list uniqueness, path confinement, and SKILL.md entrypoints.

checks.name: Suite relationships and dependencies
checks.summary: Checked relationship and skill-dependency endpoints against declared members.

checks.name: Suite evidence references
checks.summary: Resolved suite and child evidence references, checked missing paths, stale timestamps, and hash or line-count mismatches when present.

checks.name: Child closure rollup
checks.summary: Checked that accepted, checked, or passing children have current evidence and that historical progress is not promoted to closure proof.

checks.name: Unsafe suite claim scan
checks.summary: Scanned suite-facing records, member entrypoints, evidence files, and explicit --scan files for declared unsafe claim phrases.

checks.name: Suite claim boundaries
checks.summary: Checked suite map and suite contract claim boundaries for conservative no-claim categories.

claim_boundary: This static suite check covers only the suite records, member paths, relationship declarations, child closure evidence references, stale-evidence indicators, and unsafe-claim phrases loaded during this invocation. It does not prove runtime checker execution, fixture coverage, CLI checks, tests, suite automation, package publication, code-contract validation, release readiness, or future AI behavior.

current_closure_evidence.summary: Progress ledger references are treated as historical progress and cannot satisfy suite or child closure evidence.

evidence.summary: Loaded 2 suite records and inspected 2 JSON files.
Checked 1 suite evidence references for existence, stale markers, hashes, and line counts where declared.
Scanned 4 suite-facing files against 6 unsafe claim phrase rules.

problems: referenced evidence checked_at older than 30 days
referenced check report contains explicitly stale evidence

failures: evidence/stale_member_report.json: referenced evidence checked_at older than 30 days
evidence/stale_member_report.json: referenced check report contains explicitly stale evidence
member stale_member: accepted/checked child status requires current evidence_source
residual_risk: Unsafe-claim scanning uses a declared phrase set and may miss paraphrased overclaims.
This command validates current file structure and evidence references; it does not run child skill workflows or suite automation.
